name: Persana AI
description: AI GTM platform with 75+ data providers, intent signals and AI research agents for automated sales prospecting.

seo.title: Persana AI — CRM / Lifecycle Automation
seo.meta_description: Persana AI: AI GTM platform with 75+ data providers, intent signals and AI research agents for automated sales prospecting.

when_to_use: Sales prospecting with 75+ data sources and intent signals
AI research agents building enriched ICP lead lists at scale
Automated GTM outreach triggered by buying intent data
PQL scoring combining product signals with external data
Account-based targeting with real-time intent enrichment

pros: Intent signals baked into prospecting flows
AI research agents scrape public signals
Cheaper entry point than Clay for small teams
cons: Data quality varies by source combination
Smaller community, fewer templates to copy
review.verdict: Scrappier Clay alternative that covers 80% of use cases for half the complexity.
review.best_for: Startups wanting enrichment + AI research without Clays price
review.not_for: Advanced GTM engineers needing the deepest tooling

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
